transcript.text:
They're all good, but...
Let's have dumplings today
(I feel bad, so let‚Äôs order everything on the menu...) Should I order one of each?
(Today's menu)
(Galbi*, meat, kimchi, curry, specialty) *Pork Rib
(Let's simply order all the dumplings on the menu)
(Since I always eat a lot, I'm going to keep it simple today)
(Just kidding) Should I order 2 more plates?
(Hello)
(You eat quite a lot...) Wow, that's a lot...
(Didn't feel like it was enough, so I ordered more...)
(...However) (Cheese ramyun / Rice tteokbokki / Fish cake skewers)
I want more
(Don't resist the urge to eat..)
(Quiet alley near Hapjeong Station)
Hello, everyone

I'm in Hapjeong-dong today
For today, I'll be eating
galbi dumplings
(The forefront of the galbi dumpling craze) At the height of the galbi dumpling craze,
the ones at 'Mapo Dumplings' were really famous
I came here often to eat it too
It's been a while, so I decided to revisit
('Mapo Dumpling' Yanghwa-ro, Mapo-gu) Ta-da! 'Mapo Dumpling'
It used to be open 24 hours
(Unfortunately, business hours have changed) But nowadays, they're open until 9 PM
They also take breaks in between
It's been so long
Wow, the smell...
(Stimulating smell of dumplings..!) I love this smell of street food vendors
(Entering the store) Hello
Except the assorted dumplings,

(A wide selection of dumplings) they have fives types of dumplings here
They're all good, but...
But...
(Only dumplings) Let's focus on dumplings today
What's the specialty dumpling?
Spicy dumplings?
There's a lot of spicy stuff inside!
Spicy as Buldak?!
Buldak...?
(Doesn't know what Buldak is, but it's spicy...) Really?
Let's go order!
(Orders are placed using a kiosk) There are several types
Let's start with...
(All the dumplings) one of each
(Galbi, meat, kimchi, curry, specialty)
Should I try the assorted one, too?

(Hmmm)
(+Assorted dumplings)
Coke
Fanta
(Done ordering)
Thank you
Soup!
(While soothing the stomach with soup...)
(On my way)
(Dumplings are here) Wow, thank you
(Beware of your eardrums) Yummy
Wow, soy sauce!
(With chili powder!)
Let's start before the curry one comes out
What should I eat first?
Their galbi dumplings are good here

I'll have the galbi dumplings first
Wow
It's been a while, so it's very delicious
Oh, it's here!
(Curry dumplings) Thank you!
(Setting completed)
The skin is very thin
It's moist and packed inside!
So moist that it melts in my mouth
Delicious
Meat dumplings!
They're delicious
But this place has
(Undefeated no.1 galbi dumplings) the best galbi dumplings
Next up
Kimchi dumplings

They're a bit spicy
Oh, the kimchi is spicy
(After evaluation) They're as spicy as Shin Ramyun
The curry one!
I never tried the curry dumplings
Wow, the curry flavor
(The curry scent is spreading!) I never expected it to be this strong
It's like original curry!
(Curry lover)
Let's soothe the mouth
with the meat dumplings
(Re-evaluation) I think this kimchi dumpling is spicier than Shin Ramyun
Now let's try this
(What about the specialty dumplings?) I wonder how spicy this is! I never tried them
(Frowning)
(Can't handle the spiciness...)

Wow, that's spicy...
Wow, it's really spicy!
The smell of peppers
hits immediately
It's very...
Very...!
(HOT)
(Unknown menu...?) This is almost like a spicy food challenge
The galbi dumplings taste the best
(Cautious) This is too spicy!
(A pile of dumplings...) I wonder if I can finish this...
The curry is super yellow, right?
The moment I put it in my mouth,
the taste of curry
spreads really strongly
But it's delicious

The kimchi dumplings are spicier than Shin Ramyun
The specialty dumplings are spicier than Buldak!
The kimchi one is pretty spicy
But personally, I think it's
No.1 Galbi dumplings
No.2 Kimchi dumplings
No.3 Curry dumplings, no.4 Specialty Dumplings
(Refuses to evaluate it) I can't eat the specialty ones...
Pickled radish!
The galbi dumplings taste great
Obviously, it's the signature menu
If you look at the menu,
the meat and kimchi dumplings are at the top
(Irreplaceable galbi dumpling) But here, the galbi dumpling is on top
But
The speciality dumpling has 10 pieces

(8 pieces for survival...) But maybe because it's huge
Galbi dumpling
Today
I won't spare any for later
(Inhaling)
I'll eat two pieces at a time!
(Dipping)
I didn't show you the inside, did I?
(Ta-da) It looks like this
(Packed with galbi!)
(Galbi CLEARED)
Let's see the inside of the curry one
(Open)
(Packed with curry) It's just curry!
(Galbi disappeared)
Should I order more galbi dumplings?

(Going for doubles) Let's order 2 plates since it's delicious
(Going for the galbi dumplings)
I'm so scared of this one!
(Let's go for it)
Should I try one more..?
Aaaah...
(Fearful)
(Sniff)
(Smells powerful) The smell is just...!
Wow, my nose stings!!
It's super spicy..!!
(Save me)
Wow this is just...
(The nightmare is back...) Reminds me of the Cheongju's crazy dumplings...
(Cheongju crazy dumplings, the spiciest dumplings ever)
(Not on pause)

(Real spicy look)
(Cheongju crazy dumplings) It was the spiciest thing I've ever had in my life...
This, not that much
(Tastes like death) Still it's pretty close
(Extra galbi dumplings) Thank you
(Today's best, galbi dumplings) New ones are here!
Oh, today...
(Senses danger) I think I'm going to pass out on these specialty dumplings
(Let's take it home before it gets worse...) Let's pack this one, and I'll have something else
I can't take this
(Would the producer handle it...?!) Do you want some? It's very spicy!
It's best to eat it warm and fresh
The galbi dumplings are so good
(Moving position) Stack this here and call
Let's cut it in half
(Packed with moisture...!) This one is juicy and the skin is so thin!

It tastes a bit sweet
The galbi dumplings are originally sweet
(Galbi 2 CLEARED)
The meat dumpling...
tastes like tofu
It has a strong flavor of tofu
(Meat vs Kimchi, Kimchi wins) Between the two, I think kimchi wins
I'm supposed to be eating with other street food
Dumplings can't be complete without street food...
(Greedy) I want to eat them together...
Let's focus on dumplings today
You know, like tteokbokki or ramyun
( A variety of snack menus) They have rice cake tteokbokki
They even have cheese ramyun, yum!
And fish cakes!
(I knew it... LOL) So I was going to eat only dumplings today

But I want to try something else too...
Since I have to eat it with the dumpling...
I should order it now, right?
(Cleaning the table)
(Cleaning done!)
(She'll be best friends with the kiosk soon...)
Rice tteokbokki, 3 fish cakes, and cheese ramyun
(Order completed)
(The root of snacks, tteokbokki can't be missed out...)
(And tteokbokki's best friend, the fish cake!)
(A delicious street food that's served immediately)
My favorite, it's made of rice
The rice cakes of tteokbokki
must be made of rice
With soy sauce...
(Drip)

(Precious sodium) I eat a little salty...
They're uniquely twisted fish cakes
(Tornado)
Dip it in the tteokbokki sauce
Tteokbokki sauce
must be eaten with dumplings
(Spicy upgrade..!)
(Cheese ramyun) Thank you
(Ramyun is here) Looks delicious!
After all, the root of street food is ramyun...!
(Impressed)
(It's always better...) Why is ramyun different at street food restaurants?
It's not the same as making it at home
Something tastes more flavorful and
more delicious(?)
I was only going to eat dumplings, but that didn't work...

(This is why dieting is so hard) The other dishes looked so good...
(But how can you resist this...)
Wow, amazing
To the ramyun,
(Perfect) add a piece of dumpling
(There's no place dumplings don't belong...) It tastes best like this
Wow, this ramyun is so good
Wow
(Finished already)
I finished it already... lol
(Cheese ramyun CLEARED)
It tastes like tteokbokki in front of the school
But it's spicy
It's like dumpling soup
Delicious!
Let's poke some holes

So the soup soaks in
(Then it turns into dumpling ramyun lol)
2 pieces of rice cakes!
I'm gonna add one galbi dumpling
Cheese ramyun soup tastes the best!!
(Tteokbokki CLEARED)
Wow, the kimchi is spicy..!
Specialty dumpling made her weak again...
(Kimchi dumplings CLEARED)
(All good things must end with a bang) The dumplings are the icing on the cake
(Fish cakes CLEARED)
Last galbi dumplings!
(Galbi dumplings 4 plates CLEARED)
(Done) That was delicious!
Is it okay to eat that much...?
Don't you need any digestives?!

LOLOL
No, it's fine haha
That's amazing...
My original plan was to...
stack them like this and eat it
(She only covered halfway thanks to the snacks...) But I failed because I craved other street food too much
(A quick trip back in my memory...) That was the best galbi dumpling I had recently
I had another great meal!
